final:
module top_module(
    input wire Net_53,
    input wire Net_55,
    output reg clk
);always @ (Net_53, Net_55) begin
    begin end  // redundant
    if (Net_53) begin
        clk <= 1'b1;
    end else if (Net_55) begin
        clk <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
        clk <= 1'b0;
    end
end

endmodule
